metadata.description: Batch 31 — first 100 additional Oxford 5000 words, continuing IDs after Batch 30

words.definitionEn: to officially end a law or system
words.definitionTh: ยกเลิก
words.example: The new policy will abolish the outdated rule.

words.definitionEn: a medical procedure that ends a pregnancy
words.definitionTh: การยุติการตั้งครรภ์
words.example: The report uses “abortion” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the state of not being present
words.definitionTh: การขาด / การไม่อยู่
words.example: The alarm failed in the absence of power.

words.definitionEn: not present in a place
words.definitionTh: ไม่อยู่
words.example: The required label was absent.

words.definitionEn: to take in liquid, heat, or information
words.definitionTh: ดูดซับ
words.example: The material can absorb moisture.

words.definitionEn: existing as an idea rather than a physical thing
words.definitionTh: นามธรรม
words.example: The model represents an abstract concept.

words.definitionEn: completely unreasonable or illogical
words.definitionTh: ไร้เหตุผล
words.example: The proposed limit seemed absurd.

words.definitionEn: the harmful or improper use of something
words.definitionTh: การใช้ในทางที่ผิด / ใช้ในทางที่ผิด
words.example: The policy prevents abuse of company systems.

words.definitionEn: an institution for specialized study or training
words.definitionTh: สถาบันการศึกษา
words.example: She completed training at a technical academy.

words.definitionEn: to make something happen or move faster
words.definitionTh: เร่งความเร็ว
words.example: Automation can accelerate the inspection process.

words.definitionEn: a particular way of pronouncing words
words.definitionTh: สำเนียง
words.example: Her accent is easy to understand.

words.definitionEn: the act of agreeing to or approving something
words.definitionTh: การยอมรับ
words.example: The equipment passed the acceptance test.

words.definitionEn: easy to reach, use, or understand
words.definitionTh: เข้าถึงได้
words.example: The dashboard is accessible from the control room.

words.definitionEn: by chance and not intentionally
words.definitionTh: โดยบังเอิญ
words.example: The operator accidentally deleted the record.

words.definitionEn: to provide space or meet a need
words.definitionTh: รองรับ / จัดที่ให้
words.example: The rack can accommodate four cameras.

words.definitionEn: a place to live or stay temporarily
words.definitionTh: ที่พัก
words.example: The company arranged accommodation near the site.

words.definitionEn: to succeed in completing something
words.definitionTh: ทำสำเร็จ
words.example: The team accomplished its main objective.

words.definitionEn: something achieved successfully
words.definitionTh: ความสำเร็จ
words.example: Reducing defects was a major accomplishment.

words.definitionEn: in a way that is appropriate to the situation
words.definitionTh: ตามนั้น
words.example: The risk increased, so the plan was adjusted accordingly.

words.definitionEn: responsibility for actions and results
words.definitionTh: ความรับผิดชอบต่อผลลัพธ์
words.example: The workflow improves data accountability.

words.definitionEn: required to explain actions or accept responsibility
words.definitionTh: ต้องรับผิดชอบ
words.example: Each owner is accountable for assigned actions.

words.definitionEn: a person who prepares and checks financial records
words.definitionTh: นักบัญชี
words.example: The accountant reviewed the purchase records.

words.definitionEn: to gradually collect or increase
words.definitionTh: สะสม
words.example: Dust can accumulate on the lens.

words.definitionEn: a quantity gathered over time
words.definitionTh: การสะสม
words.example: The inspection found an accumulation of ice.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being correct and exact
words.definitionTh: ความแม่นยำ
words.example: Calibration improves measurement accuracy.

words.definitionEn: in a correct and exact way
words.definitionTh: อย่างแม่นยำ
words.example: The sensor measures temperature accurately.

words.definitionEn: a claim that someone has done something wrong
words.definitionTh: ข้อกล่าวหา
words.example: The report uses “accusation” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a person charged with an offense
words.definitionTh: จำเลย / ผู้ถูกกล่าวหา
words.example: The report uses “accused” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a chemical substance with a pH below seven
words.definitionTh: กรด / ที่เป็นกรด
words.example: Wear protection when handling acid.

words.definitionEn: the act of obtaining or buying something
words.definitionTh: การได้มา
words.example: The acquisition added new technology.

words.definitionEn: a unit for measuring land area
words.definitionTh: เอเคอร์
words.example: The report uses “acre” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to make a device or process start working
words.definitionTh: เปิดใช้งาน
words.example: Press the button to activate the alarm.

words.definitionEn: the process of making something active
words.definitionTh: การเปิดใช้งาน
words.example: Sensor activation starts the camera.

words.definitionEn: a person who campaigns for social or political change
words.definitionTh: นักเคลื่อนไหว
words.example: The report uses “activist” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: severe, sharp, or requiring urgent attention
words.definitionTh: รุนแรง / เฉียบพลัน
words.example: The process experienced an acute shortage.

words.definitionEn: a change made to suit new conditions
words.definitionTh: การปรับตัว
words.example: The bracket is an adaptation of the old design.

words.definitionEn: a strong dependence on a substance or activity
words.definitionTh: การเสพติด
words.example: The report uses “addiction” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: as an extra point or item
words.definitionTh: นอกจากนี้
words.example: Additionally, record the batch number.

words.definitionEn: enough for a particular purpose
words.definitionTh: เพียงพอ
words.example: The lighting is adequate for inspection.

words.definitionEn: to a satisfactory or sufficient degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างเพียงพอ
words.example: The guard adequately protects the operator.

words.definitionEn: to stick firmly or follow a rule
words.definitionTh: ยึดติด / ปฏิบัติตาม
words.example: The label must adhere to the surface.

words.definitionEn: next to or very near something
words.definitionTh: ที่อยู่ติดกัน
words.example: The sensor is adjacent to the conveyor.

words.definitionEn: to change something slightly for better performance
words.definitionTh: ปรับ
words.example: Adjust the camera angle carefully.

words.definitionEn: a small change made to improve suitability
words.definitionTh: การปรับ
words.example: A small adjustment improved image quality.

words.definitionEn: to manage or officially provide something
words.definitionTh: บริหาร / จัดการ
words.example: The report uses “administer” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: relating to the management of an organization
words.definitionTh: ด้านการบริหาร
words.example: The change requires administrative approval.

words.definitionEn: a person who manages an organization or system
words.definitionTh: ผู้ดูแลระบบ / ผู้บริหาร
words.example: The system administrator created the account.

words.definitionEn: entry permission or an acknowledgment of truth
words.definitionTh: การรับเข้า / การยอมรับ
words.example: Admission to the area requires a badge.

words.definitionEn: a young person developing into an adult
words.definitionTh: วัยรุ่น
words.example: The report uses “adolescent” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: the act of accepting or beginning to use something
words.definitionTh: การนำมาใช้ / การรับบุตรบุญธรรม
words.example: The report uses “adoption” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: harmful or unfavorable
words.definitionTh: ไม่พึงประสงค์
words.example: High humidity had an adverse effect.

words.definitionEn: a person who publicly supports a cause; to support it
words.definitionTh: ผู้สนับสนุน / สนับสนุน
words.example: The engineer advocates preventive maintenance.

words.definitionEn: concerned with beauty or artistic appearance
words.definitionTh: ด้านสุนทรียภาพ
words.example: The report uses “aesthetic” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of liking and caring for someone
words.definitionTh: ความรักใคร่
words.example: The report uses “affection” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: not too expensive for people to buy
words.definitionTh: ราคาเข้าถึงได้
words.example: The team selected an affordable camera.

words.definitionEn: the consequences following a harmful event
words.definitionTh: ผลที่ตามมา
words.example: The team reviewed the aftermath of the shutdown.

words.definitionEn: having reached a particular age or being old
words.definitionTh: มีอายุ
words.example: The report uses “aged” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: hostile or violent behavior
words.definitionTh: ความก้าวร้าว
words.example: The report uses “aggression” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: relating to farming
words.definitionTh: ทางการเกษตร
words.example: The sensor is used in agricultural equipment.

words.definitionEn: the practice and business of farming
words.definitionTh: เกษตรกรรม
words.example: Technology improves efficiency in agriculture.

words.definitionEn: a person who assists an important person
words.definitionTh: ผู้ช่วย
words.example: The project aide prepared the documents.

words.definitionEn: a serious illness that weakens the immune system
words.definitionTh: โรคเอดส์
words.example: The course includes general information about AIDS.

words.definitionEn: to warn; a warning; quick to notice danger
words.definitionTh: เตือน / การแจ้งเตือน / ตื่นตัว
words.example: The system sends an alert after detection.

words.definitionEn: a being from another world or something unfamiliar
words.definitionTh: มนุษย์ต่างดาว / แปลกแยก
words.example: The report uses “alien” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to place things in a straight line or make them agree
words.definitionTh: จัดแนว
words.example: Align the camera with the product center.

words.definitionEn: the correct positioning or agreement of things
words.definitionTh: การจัดแนว
words.example: Check the sensor alignment.

words.definitionEn: in the same or a similar way
words.definitionTh: เหมือนกัน
words.example: The two samples look alike.

words.definitionEn: a claim of wrongdoing without proof
words.definitionTh: ข้อกล่าวอ้าง
words.example: The report uses “allegation” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: to claim that someone has done something wrong
words.definitionTh: กล่าวหา
words.example: The report uses “allege” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: according to an unproven claim
words.definitionTh: ตามที่ถูกกล่าวหา
words.example: The report uses “allegedly” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: an agreement between groups to cooperate
words.definitionTh: พันธมิตร
words.example: The companies formed a technical alliance.

words.definitionEn: to officially assign resources for a purpose
words.definitionTh: จัดสรร
words.example: Allocate enough time for testing.

words.definitionEn: an amount or share officially assigned
words.definitionTh: การจัดสรร
words.example: The budget allocation was approved.

words.definitionEn: an amount of money or quantity regularly provided
words.definitionTh: เงินหรือปริมาณที่จัดให้
words.example: The design includes a small tolerance allowance.

words.definitionEn: a person or group that cooperates with another
words.definitionTh: พันธมิตร
words.example: The report uses “ally” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: next to or together with
words.definitionTh: ข้าง ๆ / ร่วมกับ
words.example: The camera operates alongside the existing sensor.

words.definitionEn: completely or considering everything
words.definitionTh: โดยรวม / ทั้งหมด
words.example: Altogether, the team tested ten samples.

words.definitionEn: a light silver-colored metal
words.definitionTh: อะลูมิเนียม
words.example: The frame is made of aluminum.

words.definitionEn: doing an activity without professional status
words.definitionTh: สมัครเล่น / มือสมัครเล่น
words.example: The event is open to amateur photographers.

words.definitionEn: a senior official representing a country abroad
words.definitionTh: เอกอัครราชทูต
words.example: The ambassador attended the ceremony.

words.definitionEn: determined to achieve success
words.definitionTh: ทะเยอทะยาน
words.example: The team set an ambitious target.

words.definitionEn: a vehicle for taking sick or injured people to hospital
words.definitionTh: รถพยาบาล
words.example: An ambulance arrived at the site.

words.definitionEn: to officially change a document or law
words.definitionTh: แก้ไขปรับปรุง
words.example: Amend the procedure after the trial.

words.definitionEn: an official change to a document or law
words.definitionTh: การแก้ไขเพิ่มเติม
words.example: The standard includes a recent amendment.

words.definitionEn: in the middle of or surrounded by
words.definitionTh: ท่ามกลาง
words.example: The line continued amid heavy demand.

words.definitionEn: funny and entertaining
words.definitionTh: น่าขบขัน
words.example: The speaker told an amusing story.

words.definitionEn: a comparison used to explain an idea
words.definitionTh: การเปรียบเทียบ
words.example: The trainer used an analogy to explain the system.

words.definitionEn: a person who examines information in detail
words.definitionTh: นักวิเคราะห์
words.example: The analyst reviewed the defect trend.

words.definitionEn: a person from whom someone is descended
words.definitionTh: บรรพบุรุษ
words.example: The museum displays tools used by our ancestors.

words.definitionEn: a heavy object used to keep a ship in place
words.definitionTh: สมอ
words.example: Use the bolt to anchor the frame.

words.definitionEn: a spiritual being represented as a messenger
words.definitionTh: เทวดา
words.example: The report uses “angel” in a clear context.

words.definitionEn: moving images created from drawings or computer graphics
words.definitionTh: แอนิเมชัน
words.example: The presentation includes a process animation.

words.definitionEn: once every year
words.definitionTh: เป็นประจำทุกปี
words.example: The system is calibrated annually.

words.definitionEn: with no name or identity shown
words.definitionTh: ไม่ระบุตัวตน
words.example: The survey responses are anonymous.

words.definitionEn: to expect something and prepare for it
words.definitionTh: คาดการณ์
words.example: We anticipate higher demand next month.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of worry or nervousness
words.definitionTh: ความวิตกกังวล
words.example: Clear instructions can reduce anxiety.

words.definitionEn: a statement expressing regret
words.definitionTh: คำขอโทษ
words.example: The supplier issued an apology for the delay.

words.definitionEn: a set of equipment used for a particular purpose
words.definitionTh: อุปกรณ์
words.example: Inspect the laboratory apparatus before use.

words.definitionEn: clothing of a particular type
words.definitionTh: เครื่องแต่งกาย
words.example: Protective apparel is required in the area.

words.definitionEn: attractive or interesting
words.definitionTh: น่าดึงดูด
words.example: The dashboard has a clear and appealing design.
